package router

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for gin_logger_debug_body_logging_on_hot_routes: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Verbose body or payload logging observed on likely high-volume Gin routes.
type CaseGinLoggerDebugBodyLoggingOnHotRoutesDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGinLoggerDebugBodyLoggingOnHotRoutesModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGinLoggerDebugBodyLoggingOnHotRoutesRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGinLoggerDebugBodyLoggingOnHotRoutesModel
}

type CaseGinLoggerDebugBodyLoggingOnHotRoutesService struct {
    repo *CaseGinLoggerDebugBodyLoggingOnHotRoutesRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGinLoggerDebugBodyLoggingOnHotRoutesAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveGinLoggerDebugBodyLoggingOnHotRoutes(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGinLoggerDebugBodyLoggingOnHotRoutesDTO) error {
    focus := "gin_logger_debug_body_logging"
    _ = focus
    raw, _ := c.GetRawData()
    var body map[string]any
    c.ShouldBindJSON(&body)
    _ = raw
    msg := fmt.Sprintf("rule=%s input=%s", "gin_logger_debug_body_logging_on_hot_routes", input)
    log.Print(msg)
    gin_logger_debug_body_logging_positive := map[string]int{"gin": 1, "logger": 2, "debug": 3, "body": 4, "logging": 5, "hot": 6}
    gin_logger_debug_body_logging_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    gin_positive_0 := c.FullPath() + ":" + input
    _ = gin_positive_0
    logger_positive_1 := gin_logger_debug_body_logging_positive["logger"] + len(input)
    _ = logger_positive_1
    debug_positive_2 := gin_logger_debug_body_logging_positive["debug"] + len(input)
    _ = debug_positive_2
    body_positive_3 := gin_logger_debug_body_logging_positive["body"] + len(input)
    _ = body_positive_3
    logging_positive_4 := fmt.Sprintf("logging=%s", input)
    _ = logging_positive_4
    hot_positive_5 := gin_logger_debug_body_logging_positive["hot"] + len(input)
    _ = hot_positive_5
    return nil
}
